---
title: "bce_with_logits"
generated: true
description: "Binary cross-entropy from logits (numerically stable)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.metrics.classification`](../nitrix-metrics-classification.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:bce_with_logits -->
```python
bce_with_logits(logits: Float[Array, '...'], targets: Float[Array, '...'], *, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:bce_with_logits -->
Binary cross-entropy from logits (numerically stable).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:bce_with_logits -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `logits` | `Float` | `...` | — | Pre-sigmoid scores. |
| `targets` | `Float` | `...` | — | Soft or hard targets in `[0, 1]`, same shape as `logits`. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | `"mean"` (default), `"sum"`, or `"none"`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:bce_with_logits -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
